name: Ivanti Neurons
description: Monitor managed device compliance, device inventory, and user access in Ivanti Neurons platform

credentialFields.label: Neurons Hostname
credentialFields.helpText: Your Ivanti Neurons hostname from the Auth URL (e.g. nvuprd-sfc.ivanticloud.com). Found in Admin > App Registrations.

credentialFields.label: Tenant ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Ivanti Neurons Tenant ID from the Auth URL. Found in Admin > App Registrations.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Client ID from your Ivanti Neurons App Registration.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Client Secret from your Ivanti Neurons App Registration. Only shown once during registration.

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies that endpoint devices are managed and discovered by Ivanti Neurons

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Retrieves a complete inventory of all endpoint devices discovered by Ivanti Neurons

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users discovered in Ivanti Neurons and flags disabled accounts
